title: Meal API Addon
description: This mod helps waste less saturation by pushing overflowing saturation into Meal API's fullness bar!
body:
Feel free to @ me in my [discord](https://discord.gg/DjXjs5Ev8r) if Meal API gets an update, as I naturally cant update this mod unless Meal API gets updated.

This mod helps waste less saturation by pushing overflowing saturation into Meal API's fullness bar.

This also allows for automatic compatability between mods that have excessive amount of saturation & Meal Api. Those complex food items giving x12 saturation? now they arent wasted! all of the excess saturation will be used to fill up your Fullness Bar instead of vanishing into the void!
